channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: aloshdenny/reverse-SynthID
item.description: reverse engineering Gemini's SynthID detection

item.title: MemPalace/mempalace
item.description: The highest-scoring AI memory system ever benchmarked. And it's free.

item.title: MemPalace/mempalace
item.description: The highest-scoring AI memory system ever benchmarked. And it's free.

item.title: vyfor/rattles
item.description: 🪇 Minimal terminal spinners for Rust

item.title: imbue-ai/bouncer
item.description: Heal your social media feeds

item.title: tw93/Waza
item.description: 🥷 Engineering habits you already know, turned into skills Claude can run.

item.title: yizhiyanhua-ai/fireworks-tech-graph
item.description: Claude Code skill for generating production-quality SVG+PNG technical diagrams. Supports 8 diagram types, 5 visual styles, and deep AI/Agent domain knowledge.

item.title: multica-ai/multica
item.description: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

item.title: QuipNetwork/xq-py
item.description: A python implementation of the Quip Network's quantum virtual machine

item.title: QuipNetwork/polkadot-sdk
item.description: The Parity Polkadot Blockchain SDK

item.title: QuipNetwork/quip-protocol-rs
item.description: A rust implementation of the Quip Protocol forked from Substrate

item.title: garrytan/gbrain
item.description: Garry's Opinionated OpenClaw/Hermes Agent Brain

item.title: matthartman/ghost-pepper
item.description: Hold-to-talk speech-to-text for macOS. 100% local, powered by WhisperKit and local LLM cleanup. Hold Control to record, release to transcribe and paste.

item.title: averygan/reclip
item.description: Download videos from almost any website. Lightweight, self-hosted media downloader with a clean web UI.

item.title: millionco/isolet
item.description: Package any component into a self-contained, isolated widget

item.title: HKUDS/OpenHarness
item.description: OpenHarness: Open Agent Harness with a built-in personal agent, Ohmo!

item.title: nashsu/llm_wiki
item.description: LLM Wiki is a cross-platform desktop application that turns your documents into an organized, interlinked knowledge base — automatically. Instead of traditional RAG (retrieve-and-answer from scratch every time), the LLM incrementally builds and maintains a persistent wiki from your sources。

item.title: Keychron/Keychron-Keyboards-Hardware-Design
item.description: All the industrial design files for Keychron keyboards and mice. Includes CAD models (case, plate, stabilizer, encoder, keycap) for Q, Q Pro, Q HE, K Pro, K Max, K HE, V Max, P HE series and M1–M7 mice. 100+ models. STEP/DXF/PDF formats. This project is source-available. Commercial use is strictly prohibited.

item.title: MiniMax-AI/cli
item.description: (no description)

item.title: obdev/littlesnitch-linux
item.description: Open Source components of Little Snitch for Linux

item.title: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
item.description: Collection of DESIGN.md files that capture design systems from popular websites. Drop one into your project and let coding agents build matching UI.

item.title: Gitlawb/openclaude
item.description: Open Claude Is Open-source coding-agent CLI for OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Ollama, Codex, GitHub Models, and 200+ models via OpenAI-compatible APIs.

item.title: phuryn/claude-usage
item.description: A local dashboard for tracking your Claude Code token usage, costs, and session history. Pro and Max subscribers get a progress bar. This gives you the full picture.

item.title: mattmireles/gemma-tuner-multimodal
item.description: Fine-tune Gemma 4 and 3n with audio, images and text on Apple Silicon, using PyTorch and Metal Performance Shaders.

item.title: farzaa/clicky
item.description: (no description)

item.title: LaurieWired/tailslayer
item.description: Library for reducing tail latency in RAM reads

item.title: Arthur-Ficial/apfel
item.description: Apple Intelligence from the command line. On-device LLM via FoundationModels framework. No API keys, no cloud, no dependencies.

item.title: aaif-goose/goose
item.description: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

item.title: GitFrog1111/badclaude
item.description: (no description)

item.title: milla-jovovich/mempalace
item.description: The highest-scoring AI memory system ever benchmarked. And it's free.

item.title: arman-bd/guppylm
item.description: A ~9M parameter LLM that talks like a small fish.

item.title: fikrikarim/parlor
item.description: On-device, real-time multimodal AI. Have natural voice and vision conversations with an AI that runs entirely on your machine. Powered by Gemma 4 E2B and Kokoro.

item.title: santifer/career-ops
item.description: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing.

item.title: safishamsi/graphify
item.description: Claude Code skill. Drop code, papers, images, or notes into a folder and get a knowledge graph with community detection, god nodes, and honest audit trail.
